headline: Covid Vaccine Maker BioNTech Offers Cheap Biotech Play Given Huge Cash Reserves
summary: The company’s cash and securities nearly equal its market value, meaning investors aren’t paying much for the Covid franchise and a pipeline focused on cancer treatments.

raw.headline: Covid Vaccine Maker BioNTech Offers Cheap Biotech Play Given Huge Cash Reserves
raw.summary: The company’s cash and securities nearly equal its market value, meaning investors aren’t paying much for the Covid franchise and a pipeline focused on cancer treatments.

headline: Can Merck's New Drugs & Pipeline Ease Keytruda LOE Concerns?
summary: MRK bets on new products and a growing pipeline as Keytruda nears 2028 LOE, with $70B potential commercial opportunities projected by mid-2030s.

raw.headline: Can Merck's New Drugs & Pipeline Ease Keytruda LOE Concerns?

headline: 3 Top Dividend Stocks to Maximize Your Retirement Income
summary: The traditional ways to plan for your retirement may mean income can no longer cover expenses post-employment. But what if there was another option that could provide a steady, reliable source of income in your nest egg years?

raw.headline: 3 Top Dividend Stocks to Maximize Your Retirement Income

headline: This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) costs $6 a year on a $10,000 investment, holds 100 dividend stocks, and currently yields 3.39%. With the Fed funds rate sitting at 3.75% and most high-yield savings accounts paying in that same neighborhood, the yield gap is narrow. But SCHD adds something a savings account never will: price ... This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts

headline: Neurocrine Biosciences: The Song Remains The Same
summary: Neurocrine Biosciences has rebounded 60% since April 2025, driven by robust Ingrezza sales and Crenessity's uncontested launch. Read why NBIX stock is a hold.
